Definition (C:\Users\ahumeaub\Desktop\CLionProject\TestAffichageSynchrone\include\LibVLC\include\vlc\plugins\vlc_plugin.h)

  • Program Listing for File vlc_plugin.h

Detailed Description

This file implements plugin (module) macros used to define a vlc module.

Included By

  • File vlc_config_cat.h
